overview.title: School Forms & Documents
overview.description: Download important school documents, application forms, and information materials below. For any document not listed here, please contact our school office.

items.title: Admission Form
items.description: Official application form for new student admissions. Fill, sign, and submit to the school office along with the required documents.

items.title: School Prospectus
items.description: Complete school prospectus covering our curriculum, facilities, programmes, fee overview, and school philosophy. Ideal reading for new parents.

items.title: Fee Structure
items.description: Detailed class-wise fee structure for the current academic year. Please contact the school office for the latest confirmed figures.

items.title: Academic Calendar
items.description: Full-year academic planner with term start/end dates, examination schedules, public holidays, and important school events.

items.title: Transport Application Form
items.description: Application form for the school bus service. Fill and submit to the transport coordinator at the school office to register for a route.

items.title: School Handbook
items.description: Complete guide to school rules, discipline policies, uniform requirements, conduct expectations, and general information for students and parents.

items.title: Parent Declaration Form
items.description: Declaration form to be signed by parents or guardians at the time of admission, acknowledging school rules and policies.
